_comment: T4 (spec 013) — internal gold set (PRD §17.3). Small, hand-curated set drawn from prior releases of THIS engine, used to regression-test graph/prompt/model changes. Synthetic/internal data only — no PII, no customer names, no secrets (constitution §5, domain-gdpr). Each case names a release boundary, the features that SHOULD be surfaced as marketable, the approved copy snippets a good draft echoes, the changes that must NOT be marketed (noise the clusterer should drop), and the claims a correct pipeline must flag as risky/unsupported.

approved_copy: Sensitive data is redacted before it ever reaches storage.
Reviewers approve a feature manifest before any content is generated.
non_marketable_changes: Bump ruff to 0.6.9 in dev dependencies
Add debug logging to the boundary reader
risky_claims: Our redaction is 100% guaranteed to remove all personal data.
ShipSignal is fully GDPR-certified by the EU.

approved_copy: Generate a validated demo video straight from an approved script.
Ship an audio digest of every release for busy stakeholders.
non_marketable_changes: Increase ffmpeg assembler timeout from 30s to 60s
Refactor the S3 key builder for readability
risky_claims: Demo videos render in under one second every time.
The narration voice is indistinguishable from a specific named celebrity.
